1.content:
Um Tommy are we lost, all of a sudden Chuckie starts freaking out. Guys I'll use my compass to find our way out of the forest, but instead of finding their way out they get deeper into the forest. Tommy are you sure you're using it right? When all of a sudden Tommy's brother Dil yells poppie as he poops his diapie. Well it looks like we have to change his diapie. Who's we Tommy said Phil and Lil. O come on you guys, nope he's your brother not ours Tommy. So Tommy gets ready to change Dil's diapie. Is this where Angelica appears or not yet?

(a) yes and says you dumb babies don't know how to change a diaper, before she helps Tommy before Dil starts peeing and a frog lands on Chuckie's head.
(b) yes and as Dil starts peeing and a frog lands on Chuckie's head.
(c) no it's just Tommy, his friends, and brother, and Dil starts peeing and a frog lands on Chuckie's head.
(d) yes but after Dil starts peeing and a frog lands on Chuckie's head.
(e) yes after Tommy is done changing Dil's diapie.
1.title: We're lost Tommy

11.content: She walks up to them?
11.title: (a)

111.content:
Angelica has been following behind them, but does she admit that she found them because she followed them or does she say that she was lost too and just happened to hear them and decided to follow where the sound was coming from. Which one did she go with before helping Tommy?

(a) admitted she followed them.
(b) she was lost and followed their voices.
(c) she says nothing and lets them come up with how she found them in the woods.
111.title: Yeah.

1111.content: Do they let her help with Dil?
1111.title: (a)

11111.content:
Tommy does and makes a sly joke out of it by saying see guys how Angelica is willing to help me change Dil's diapie even though she's has called us dumb babies. What do the others say next?

(a) she's just pretending to be helpful so we can get moving and find our way out of here Tommy.
(b) she's helping you only because she's your and Dil's cousin Tommy.
(c) Angelica interrupts the others by saying I'm helping because I secretly wish I had a baby sister or brother but all I have that's somewhat close to that are my cousins Tommy and Dil.
11111.title: Yeah.

112.content:
Stu and Didi sent Spike to find them, and Angelica makes a big mistake when she says how's Spike going to be able to bring them back here. That's when all of a sudden Spike knocks Angelica over and drags her by her shoes all the way to Tommy and the rest of the babies. What is happening when Spike arrives with Angelica?

(a) Tommy is just starting to change Dil and asks Angelica to help him.
(b) Tommy is in the middle of changing Dil and Asks Angelica to help him finish changing Dil.
(c) Tommy just got done changing Dil and asks Angelica to them find their way back to their parents.
112.title: Spike drags her there.

1121.content: Does she agree to do so?
1121.title: (a)

11211.content:
Wait Angelica are you seriously going to change Dil's diapie? Well yes I am Lil because unlike you, Chuckie, and Phil I have to do whatever my aunt asks me to do. Do the other babies take her seriously now or does Tommy have to let Angelica take over changing Dil's diapie in order to get his friends to realize just how serious Angelica is right now?

(a) only Chuckie
(b) every one but Lil, and Phil has to remind her that she's 1hr and 30 minutes older than him and so sometimes their mom makes Lil help her change Phil's diaper.
(c) nobody so Tommy lets Angelica take over changing Dil's diapie.
11211.title: Yup.

info.brief_description: Tommy, Dil, Chuckie, Phil, and Lil are in the woods and Tommy has to change Dil's diapie.
info.description: Does Angelica follow them into the woods or not?
